protocol_check.evidence: Console error: net::ERR_HTTP2_PING_FAILED on signaler-pa.clients6 resource
protocol_check.note: Gemini uses HTTP/2 (h2), NOT HTTP/3 (h3/QUIC). Protocol confirmed via Console ERR_HTTP2_PING_FAILED error on connection.

result.page_response: Gemini responded normally with privacy guidance about national ID numbers. No block or warning displayed.

console_errors: Fetch API cannot load googleleadservices.com - CSP violation

notes: CRITICAL FINDING: Gemini uses HTTP/2 (h2), not HTTP/3 (h3/QUIC). This means Etap proxy CAN intercept Gemini traffic via standard h2 interception. The ERR_HTTP2_PING_FAILED error in Console confirms h2 usage. However, Gemini is still NOT blocked despite block_mode=1 and etapd restart - batchexecute returns 200. Further investigation needed on why blocking fails.
